posts.author: itzjshine (Joey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m looking for help automating a workflow on my Activities board. Here’s how it’s currently set up:

  • Columns:
    1. Subject
    2. Contact (Connect Boards column)
    3. Follow-Up Date (Date column) – connected to Follow-Up Status using Deadline Mode
    4. Follow-Up Status (Status column)
    • Status options: Due, Overdue, Not Due Yet

Goal:
I want the Follow-Up Status to automatically update based on the Follow-Up Date. For example:

  • If the Follow-Up Date is today → Status = Due
  • If the Follow-Up Date is in the past → Status = Overdue
  • If the Follow-Up Date is in the future → Status = Not Due Yet

Current Setup:
I have Deadline Mode enabled for the Follow-Up Date and Follow-Up Status, but I still need to update the status manually whenever I change the date.

Question:
Is there a way to set this up so that the Follow-Up Status automatically updates whenever the Follow-Up Date changes?

Any suggestions or automation tips would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks!
